Subscription Canceled

Your subscription has been canceled

We've successfully canceled your MO'GUALA subscription.

Your access details are listed below. If you have any questions, we're here to help.

Status Canceled
Subscription {{subscription_title}}
Canceled On {{cancel_date}}
Final Billing {{period_end}}

What Happens Now

Your premium access will remain active until the end of your current billing period ({{period_end}}). After that date, your access will be revoked.

What You Can Do

Reactivate Anytime: You can reactivate your subscription at any time through your account dashboard.
Export Your Data: Download your saved preferences and history before your access expires.
Contact Us: We'd love to hear feedback on why you canceled. Reach out to our support team.
⚠️ No refund will be issued for the current billing period. Your account data will be retained for 30 days.

We'll miss you! If there's anything we could have done better, or if you'd like to give us feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out.
